workflow.description: refer to PO/Bill Approval matrix record for the hierarchy for each entity or department.
workflow.name: UEC 3 Way Match Vendor Bill Approval

workflowcustomfield.label: [SS] VB Amt Less Than PO Amt
[SS] VB Amt Greater Than PO Amt
[SS] VB Qty Less Than PO Qty
[SS] VB Qty Greater Than PO Qty

parametersetting.valuetext: accountingpreferences
CUSTOMAPPROVALVENDORBILL

initcondition.formula: ( isEmpty("CEO") = 'T' AND "Total in Base Currency" > "CFO Limit" AND isEmpty("Attach Approval Email") = 'T' AND "PO/Bill Approval Matrix" NOT IN ("PO/Bill/Expense Approval Matrix1","PO/Bill/Expense Approval Matrix2") )
"State:approval routing" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: LOCATIONS
SUBSIDIARIES

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Subsidiary Status" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: purchaseorderquantity

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Subsidiary Status" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: purchaseorderquantitydiff

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Subsidiary Status" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: purchaseorderamount

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Subsidiary Status" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: receiptquantity

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Subsidiary Status" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: receiptquantitydiff

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Subsidiary Status" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: receiptamount

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-PO: Terms") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between Terms on Bill and PO

setfieldvalueaction.valuetext: Discrepancy between Terms on Bill and PO

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] Receipt of Item") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: Items are not yet received

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-PO: Location") = 'T' AND "Workflow:[3WAY] Location Feature Status" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between Location on Bill and PO

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB Standalone") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: No matching PO can be found for the Vendor Bill

setfieldvalueaction.valuetext: No matching PO can be found for the Vendor Bill

parametersetting.valuetext: ADVRECEIVING

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Advanced Receiving Status" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: accountingpreferences
UNRECEIVEDBILLS

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Advanced Receiving Bill Status" = 1
isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-PO: Vendor Qty Tolerance") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and PO exceeds the Vendor Quantity Tolerance limit

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-PO: Item Qty Tolerance") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and PO exceeds the Item Quantity Tolerance limit

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-PO: Subsidiary Qty Tolerance") = 'T' AND "Workflow:[3WAY] Subsidiary Status" = 1 AND "Workflow:[3WAY] Subs potolerance" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and PO exceeds the Subsidiary Quantity Tolerance limit

setfieldvalueaction.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and PO exceeds the Subsidiary Quantity Tolerance limit

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Advanced Receiving Status" = 1 AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-IR: Vendor Qty Tolerance") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and Item Receipt exceeds the Vendor Quantity Tolerance limit

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Advanced Receiving Status" = 1 AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-IR: Item Qty Tolerance") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and Item Receipt exceeds the Item Quantity Tolerance limit

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Subsidiary Status" = 1 AND "Workflow:[3WAY] Advanced Receiving Status" = 1 AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-IR: Subsidiary Qty Tolerance") = 'T' AND "Workflow:[3WAY] Subs irtolerance" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and Item Receipt exceeds the Subsidiary Quantity Tolerance limit

setfieldvalueaction.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and Item Receipt exceeds the Subsidiary Quantity Tolerance limit

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-PO: Vendor Qty Difference") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and PO exceeds the Vendor Quantity difference limit

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-PO: Item Qty Difference") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and PO exceeds the Item Quantity difference limit

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-PO: Subsidiary Qty Difference") = 'T' AND "Workflow:[3WAY] Subsidiary Status" = 1 AND "Workflow:[3WAY] Subs podifference" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and PO exceeds the Subsidiary Quantity difference limit

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Advanced Receiving Status" = 1 AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-IR: Vendor Qty Difference") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and Item Receipt exceeds the Vendor Quantity Difference limit

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Advanced Receiving Status" = 1 AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-IR: Subsidiary Qty Difference") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and Item Receipt exceeds the Item Quantity Difference limit

initcondition.formula: "Workflow:[3WAY] Advanced Receiving Status" = 1 AND "Workflow:[3WAY] Subsidiary Status" = 1 AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-IR: Subsidiary Qty Difference") = 'T' AND "Workflow:[3WAY] Subs irdifference" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Quantity on Bill and Item Receipt exceeds the Subsidiary Quantity Difference limit

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB Qty Greater Than PO Qty") = 'T'

parameter.name: Workflow:[SS] VB Qty Greater Than PO Qty

parametersetting.valuetext: Bill quantity exceeds PO quantity

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB Qty Less Than PO Qty") = 'T'

parameter.name: Workflow:[SS] VB Qty Less Than PO Qty

parametersetting.valuetext: PO quantity exceeds Bill quantity

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-PO: Vendor Amt Tolerance") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Amount on Bill and PO exceeds the Vendor Amount Tolerance limit

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-PO: Item Amt Tolerance") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Amount on Bill and PO exceeds the Item Amount Tolerance limit

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-PO: Subsidiary Amt Tolerance") = 'T' AND "Workflow:[3WAY] Subsidiary Status" = 1 AND "Workflow:[3WAY] Subs poamount" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Amount on Bill and PO exceeds the Subsidiary Amount Tolerance limit

setfieldvalueaction.valuetext: Discrepancy between the Amount on Bill and PO exceeds the Subsidiary Amount Tolerance limit

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB Amt Greater Than PO Amt") = 'T'

parameter.name: Workflow:[SS] VB Amt Greater Than PO Amt

parametersetting.valuetext: Bill amount exceeds PO amount

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB Amt Less Than PO Amt") = 'T'

parameter.name: Workflow:[SS] VB Amt Less Than PO Amt

parametersetting.valuetext: PO amount exceeds Bill amount

initcondition.formula: "Subsidiary (Main)" IN ("{#Subsidiary#}1","{#Subsidiary#}2")
isEmpty("CEO") = 'T' AND "Total in Base Currency" > "CFO Limit" AND isEmpty("Attach Approval Email") = 'T'
"User" IN ("Entered By") AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB Standalone") = 'T'
"User" NOT IN ("Entered By")
isEmpty("CEO") = 'T' AND "Total in Base Currency" > "CFO Limit"
"Subsidiary (Main)" IN ("{#Subsidiary#}1","{#Subsidiary#}2","{#Subsidiary#}3","{#Subsidiary#}4","{#Subsidiary#}5","{#Subsidiary#}6")
isChecked("Workflow:[3WAY] Exception Status") = 'T'
isChecked("Workflow:[3WAY] Exception Status") = 'F'
isChecked("Workflow:[3WAY] Exception Status") = 'F' AND isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Bill Reviewer") = 'F'
"User" NOT IN ("Next Approver")

sendemailaction.body: <br>The Vendor Bill {transactionnumber} has been approved by {nextapprover}.<br>To view the Vendor Bill, kindly log in to your NetSuite account at http://www.netsuite.com.
sendemailaction.subject: Your Vendor Bill {transactionnumber} is Approved

initcondition.formula: Workflow : [3WAY] Exception Status = T And Workflow : [3WAY] Bill Creator : E-mail Is Not Empty
isChecked("Use Vendor Approver") = 'F'
isChecked("Use Vendor Approver") = 'T'
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User" IN ("Current Approver")
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User" IN ("Current Approver")
"User Role" NOT IN ("Role1")
"User" NOT IN ("Entered By")
"User" IN ("Workflow:[3WAY] Bill Creator") AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB Standalone") = 'T'
"Total in Base Currency" <= "Approver 1 Limit" AND ( isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Bill Reviewer") = 'F' OR isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Bill Approver Role") = 'F' )
"Total in Base Currency" > "Approver 1 Limit"
isEmpty("Approver 1 User") = 'T' AND isEmpty("Approver 1") = 'T'
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User" IN ("Current Approver")
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User" IN ("Current Approver")
"User Role" NOT IN ("Role1")
"User" NOT IN ("Entered By")
"User" IN ("Workflow:[3WAY] Bill Creator") AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB Standalone") = 'T'
"Total in Base Currency" <= "Approver 2 Limit" AND isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Final Approver 1") = 'T'
"Total in Base Currency" <= "Approver 2 Limit" AND ( isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Bill Reviewer") = 'F' OR isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Bill Approver Role") = 'F' )
"Total in Base Currency" > "Approver 2 Limit"
isEmpty("Approver 2") = 'T' AND isEmpty("Approver 2 User") = 'T'
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User" IN ("Current Approver")
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User" IN ("Current Approver")
"User Role" NOT IN ("Role1")
"User" NOT IN ("Entered By")
"User" IN ("Workflow:[3WAY] Bill Creator") AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB Standalone") = 'T'
"Total in Base Currency" <= "Approver 3 Limit" AND isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Final Approver 1") = 'T'
"Total in Base Currency" <= "Approver 3 Limit" AND ( isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Bill Approver Role") = 'F' OR isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Bill Reviewer") = 'F' )
"Total in Base Currency" > "Approver 3 Limit"
isEmpty("Approver 3") = 'T' AND isEmpty("Approver 3 User") = 'T'
"Total in Base Currency" > "Approver 4 Limit"
"Total in Base Currency" <= "Approver 4 Limit"
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User" IN ("Current Approver")
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User" IN ("Current Approver")
"User Role" NOT IN ("Role1")
"User" NOT IN ("Entered By")
"User" IN ("Workflow:[3WAY] Bill Creator") AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB Standalone") = 'T'
"Total in Base Currency" <= "Approver 4 Limit" AND isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Final Approver 1") = 'T'
"Total in Base Currency" <= "Approver 4 Limit" AND isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Final Approver 1") = 'F'
"Total in Base Currency" > "Approver 4 Limit"
isEmpty("Approver 4") = 'T' AND isEmpty("Approver 4 User") = 'T' AND "Total in Base Currency" <= "PO/Bill Approval Matrix:CFO Limit"
isEmpty("Approver 4 User") = 'T'
"Total in Base Currency" > "PO/Bill Approval Matrix:CFO Limit"
"Total in Base Currency" <= "PO/Bill Approval Matrix:CFO Limit"
"Total in Base Currency" <= "PO/Bill Approval Matrix:CFO Limit"
( "User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") )
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1")
"User Role" NOT IN ("Role1") OR "User Role" NOT IN ("Next Approver Role")
"User" NOT IN ("Entered By")
"User" IN ("Workflow:[3WAY] Bill Creator") AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB Standalone") = 'T'

( "Total in Base Currency" <= "CFO Limit" OR "PO/Bill Approval Matrix" NOT IN ("PO/Bill/Expense Approval Matrix1","PO/Bill/Expense Approval Matrix2","PO/Bill/Expense Approval Matrix3","PO/Bill/Expense Approval Matrix4","PO/Bill/Expense Approval Matrix5","PO/Bill/Expense Approval Matrix6") ) AND isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Final Approver 1") = 'T'
"Total in Base Currency" <= "CFO Limit" AND ( isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Bill Approver Role") = 'F' OR isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Bill Reviewer") = 'F' )
( isEmpty("CEO") = 'F' AND "Total in Base Currency" > "CFO Limit" ) AND NOT "Approver 1" IN ("Role1")
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1")
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1")
"User Role" NOT IN ("Role1")
"User" IN ("Workflow:[3WAY] Bill Creator") AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB Standalone") = 'T'
isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Bill Reviewer") = 'T'
isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Bill Reviewer") = 'F'
"PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Final Approver 2" NOT IN ("Employee1","Employee2")
"PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Final Approver 2" IN ("Employee1","Employee2")
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User" IN ("Current Approver")
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User" IN ("Current Approver")
"User Role" NOT IN ("Role1")
"User" NOT IN ("Entered By")
"PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Final Approver 2" NOT IN ("Employee1","Employee2") AND isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Final Approver 2") = 'F'
"PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Final Approver 2" IN ("Employee1","Employee2") OR isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Final Approver 2") = 'T'
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User" IN ("Current Approver")
"User Role" IN ("Current Approver Role") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User" IN ("Current Approver")
"User Role" NOT IN ("Role1")
"User" NOT IN ("Entered By")
isEmpty("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Final Approver 2") = 'T'
"User" IN ("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Bill Reviewer") OR "User Role" IN ("PO/Bill Approval Matrix:Bill Approver Role")
"User" IN ("Workflow:[3WAY] Bill Creator") AND "User Role" IN ("Role1") AND isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB Standalone") = 'T'
"Workflow:currentState" = 'accReview'
